title: Watch: LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, And KATSEYE Takes 1st Win For “ICONIC BY MISTAKE” On “M Countdown”; Performances By EVAN, And More
content:
LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, and KATSEYE have won their first music show trophy for their collab single “ICONIC BY MISTAKE“! On the June 25 episode of “M Countdown,” the candidates for first place were RIIZE’s “Do your dance” and LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, and KATSEYE’s “ICONIC BY MISTAKE.” LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, and KATSEYE ultimately took the prize with a total of… Continue reading Watch: LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, And KATSEYE Takes 1st Win For “ICONIC BY MISTAKE” On “M Countdown”; Performances By EVAN, And More
The post Watch: LE SSERAFIM, ILLIT, And KATSEYE Takes 1st Win For “ICONIC BY MISTAKE” On “M Countdown”; Performances By EVAN, And More appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: LE SSERAFIM、ILLIT、KATSEYE合作曲《ICONIC BY MISTAKE》获《M Countdown》一位
facts_list: 6月25日《M Countdown》节目中，一位候补为RIIZE的《Do your dance》和LE SSERAFIM、ILLIT、KATSEYE的《ICONIC BY MISTAKE》。
LE SSERAFIM、ILLIT、KATSEYE最终凭借总分获得一位。
summary_zh: 在6月25日播出的《M Countdown》中，LE SSERAFIM、ILLIT和KATSEYE凭借合作单曲《ICONIC BY MISTAKE》击败RIIZE的《Do your dance》，获得一位。这是她们合作曲的首个音乐节目冠军。

content:

title_zh: 6月演员品牌声誉排行榜公布，许南俊登顶
facts_list: 韩国企业评价研究所于6月23日发布6月演员品牌声誉排行榜
排名基于5月23日至6月23日期间100名出演电视剧、电影或OTT内容的演员的媒体曝光、参与度、互动及社区指数数据分析
许南俊（Heo Nam Jun）近期表现突出，具体排名需查看完整榜单
summary_zh: 韩国企业评价研究所公布了6月演员品牌声誉排行榜，该排名基于5月23日至6月23日期间对100名出演电视剧、电影或OTT内容的演员进行的数据分析，涵盖媒体曝光、参与度、互动及社区指数。许南俊近期表现突出，具体排名详情请见完整榜单。
